meta_title: For Founders: passive income to Solve can't finish projects (Intermediate Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to passive income and overcome can't finish projects. A Intermediate-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: Passive Income to Solve Project Stagnation
content.seo_description: Break the loop of unfinished projects. Use Antigravity and Claude Code to build passive income engines. Intermediate-level guide for SaaS founders.
content.answer_block: The cycle of unfinished projects stems from over-engineering without revenue validation. To solve this, build 'micro-SaaS' assets that solve one specific, high-intent problem. By automating delivery with Antigravity and iterating via Claude Code, you transform stagnant prototypes into lean, passive income machines that require minimal maintenance.
content.intro:
You know the graveyard well: a graveyard of half-baked repositories, abandoned domain names, and the crushing weight of 'what could have been.' Most founders fail not because they lack skill, but because they lack a feedback loop that rewards completion over perfection. The friction of shipping is the ultimate project killer.

But what if you stopped building products and started building assets? By shifting your focus to passive income, you align your technical efforts with market demand, forcing you to kill features that don't pay and prioritize the core value proposition. It’s time to stop coding for ego and start coding for equity.

steps.title: Define the High-Intent Micro-Problem
steps.description: Identify a small, painful task that users are currently paying manual labor to solve. Focus on high-frequency, low-complexity problems.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Act as a SaaS architect. Analyze the niche of [Insert Niche] and identify three micro-tasks that are currently manual, time-consuming, and ready for automation. Rank them by revenue potential.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'analyze niche for micro-saas opportunities'

steps.title: Scaffold the MVP Core with Antigravity
steps.description: Use Antigravity to generate the foundational infrastructure. Do not build custom auth or complex dashboards yet; stick to the core utility.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a lean Node.js boilerplate that includes stripe integration for subscriptions and a basic queue system for processing tasks. Keep it minimal.

steps.title: Automate Value Delivery
steps.description: Implement the core logic that solves the user problem. This must run in the background without user intervention.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a worker service that listens to the queue, processes the user-provided data using the OpenAI API, and updates the database with the result.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'create background worker for processing payloads'

steps.title: Implement Self-Healing Loops
steps.description: Use Claude Code to add error handling and self-recovery so the app runs while you sleep.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Review the current codebase and add robust error handling, retry logic for API calls, and Slack notifications for critical failures.

steps.title: Deploy to Production
steps.description: Ship to a managed environment that requires zero ops maintenance.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a deployment configuration for Vercel/Railway that optimizes for cost and speed.

pro_tips: Never build a UI for an MVP if a command-line interface or a simple JSON API suffices for your early adopters.
Use 'Feature Flag' toggles to disable features rather than deleting code; it keeps your repository clean and allows for instant pivoting.
The most profitable SaaS apps are those that replace an Excel spreadsheet, not those that try to reinvent a social network.
If your code doesn't have a direct path to a Stripe webhook, you are not building a product—you are building a hobby.
Automate your marketing: Use your worker service to generate social proof content based on successful user transactions.
content.next_steps: Once the MVP is live, spend 80% of your time on distribution. Reach out to 50 potential users in your niche and offer them a 30-day free trial in exchange for a testimonial.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting your ideas die in the staging environment. Use this framework to ship, monetize, and scale your way out of the build-trap. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
